title: Bitcoin and ethereum prices today, Friday, May 1, 2026: Prices moving higher this morning
author: Sigma Capital
metaDescription: As of 7:17 a.m. ET, Bitcoin was $77,376.65, and Ethereum was $2,284.34, both showing gains. Bitcoin held above $79,000, and Ethereum reached $2,480.
